calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pacific Service Credit Union.
Jeff Rodgers, Loan Service Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defenant Rica A. Thomas, a/k/a Rica Aisha Thomas Antoniotti.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 1, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 1, 2009.
Defendant's answer to the complaint was filed on October 29, 2009, but was stricken on February 8, 2010 for failure to pay filing fees.

Exhibits 1 to 30--Case Summary, Witness List and Statements of Account---------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Pacific Service Credit Union, and against defendant Rica A. Thomas, a/k/a Rica Aisha Thomas Antoniotti as follows:

Principal - $10,709.44.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,221.69.
Attorney Fees - $1,400.00.
Costs - $420.00.

Total - $13,751.13.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion To Strike Deft'S Answer And/Or For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PACIFIC SERVICE CREDIT UNION'S Motion To Strike Defendants Answer And/Or For Judgment On The Pleadings is off calendar for insufficient notice. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/pjb
